de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.profile

Class SimplifyTermProfile

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.AbstractProfile
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.JavaProfile
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.profile.SimplifyTermProfile
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Profile

    public class SimplifyTermProfile
extends JavaProfile
    An extended JavaProfile used in side proofs to simplify a Term.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

      Modifier and Type Field and Description

      The default instance of this class.

      The Name of this Profile.

    • Field Detail

      • NAME

        public static final String NAME
        The Name of this Profile.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SIDE_PROOF_FACTORY

        private static final StrategyFactory SIDE_PROOF_FACTORY
        The used StrategyFactory of the SymbolicExecutionStrategy.

      • defaultInstance

        public static SimplifyTermProfile defaultInstance

        The default instance of this class.

        It is typically used in the Thread of the user interface. Other instances of this class are typically only required to use them in different Threads (not the UI Thread).

      • getDefaultInstance

        public static SimplifyTermProfile getDefaultInstance()

        Returns the default instance of this class.

        It is typically used in the Thread of the user interface. Other instances of this class are typically only required to use them in different Threads (not the UI Thread).

        Returns:
        The default instance for usage in the Thread of the user interface.
